title: AI System Sync package manifest (claude-project.sync.json)
description: Hand-authored mapping and naming-decision contract for one registered system's derived claude.ai Project package. lib/manifest.cjs enforces this shape at runtime with a hand-rolled validator (the fleet is dependency-free, so no JSON Schema engine is installed); this file is the documented reference the validator is written against, not an executable schema.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Starts at 1 per the design authority.

id.description: Must match one registry.json system id exactly.

skillRoot.description: Current sk-* folder name, repo-root-relative. Must match registry.json's skillRoot for this id.

skillId.description: Stable invocation or graph identity for this skill (e.g. the description.json "name" or graph-metadata.json "skill_id"), used by the graph-target and retired-token checks.

knowledgeRoot.description: Fixed location of the Project Knowledge mirror folder, package-root-relative.

path.description: Fixed location of the hand-synthesized kernel, package-root-relative.

alignedSkillVersion.description: Human-selected claim of which sk-* skill version this kernel is aligned to.

include.description: Authoritative source paths (package-root-relative), each either a file or a folder covering every file recursively beneath it - there is no glob syntax, naming a folder is how "cover everything in it" is expressed. Every file covered here must be mapped by an entry in "mirrors", or the run blocks as UNMAPPED_SOURCE.

exclude.description: Changelogs, archives, benchmarks, or other intentional coverage omissions.

target.description: Exact Project Knowledge filename this source mirrors to, inside knowledgeRoot. Never derived from frontmatter or version text - always an explicit human naming decision.

sourceVersion.description: Version pin as it exists in the authoritative source.

projectVersion.description: Version pin as it appears in the mirror's filename/frontmatter.

contractInputs.description: Package-root-relative paths whose combined bytes make up the ai-system-contract-v1 digest. A change to any of these requires a recorded review-kernel decision.

command.description: Argument vector, e.g. ["python3", "benchmark/_gates/gates.py", "check"]. Never a shell string, so no shell-quoting ambiguity.

cwd.description: Package-root-relative directory to run the command from.

retiredNames.description: Old folder, mirror, or version tokens forbidden outside declared history (scanExcludes).

scanExcludes.description: Historical changelog/archive paths (package-root-relative) exempt from the retired-token scan.

expectedKnowledgeCount.description: Must equal the number of declared mirror entries.

path.description: The mirror target path (knowledgeRoot-relative) or kernel path this exception applies to.

reason.description: Documented reason the byte-parity check is waived for this path (e.g. link retargeting plus frontmatter addition).

derivationExceptions.description: Declared, reviewed exceptions to the plain byte-copy mirror rule. Every other mirror not listed here must be byte-identical to its dereferenced source.

target.description: Package-root-relative file containing the generated region(s), e.g. "SYNC.md" or "claude project/README.md".

sections.description: Section names used in that file's BEGIN/END markers.
